Game.Name: International Superstar Soccer Deluxe (Europe)
Game.plot: Overview: ISS Deluxe, known as Jikkyou World Soccer 2: Fighting Eleven in Japan, was the 1995 follow-up to International Superstar Soccer. The game was released the same year as the original ISS and featured several incremental improvements including: Improved grpahicsAdditional commentaryTwo players (instead of one) were able to compete co-operatively against the computer AI.Teams Asia / AfricaEurope 1Europe 2Europe 3 Cameroon Japan Morocco Nigeria South Korea Turkey England Germany Italy Northern Ireland Scotland Wales France Holland Ireland Norway Portugal Spain Austria Belgium Czech Republic Denmark Poland Sweden Europe 4North & South AmericaAll Stars * Bulgaria Croatia Greece Romania Russia Switzerland Argentina Brazil Columbia Mexcio United States Uruguay African Stars All Star Americans All Stars Asian Stars Euro Stars A Euro Stars B *secret unlockCheat: All Star TeamAt the title screen press R, Up, Down, L, X, B, Left, A, Right, Y, if you did it correctly you will hear a dog's bark. Note: You have to use the 2nd controller (1st doesn't work at all for this code)Cheat: Play last game vs World All Stars in International CupPlay last game vs World All Stars in International CupCheat: Extra skill pointsEnter edit players mode before the match and use all available skill points. Highlight the "Cancel" option and press Y for 200 additional skill points.
Game.Notes: The best just got better... We improved our hit original game by upgrading old features and adding new ones to bring you International Superstar Soccer DELUXE - the most realistic soccer game ever released on the Super NES ...PERIOD! International Superstar Soccer Deluxe brings the thrills of world-class futbol competition to the Super NES! This is what soccer is all about. The sweat. The pain. The bruises. the Right to call your team the best in the world. And this is the only place to find it.
